name: join-error-non-vec-subject
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown ::JoinSubjectNotVec
  :message "join requires Vec of Strings subject, got number"
  :operand "join"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec of Strings"
  :actualType :number
  :actualValue 42
  :fault {:step ~{join(",")} :input 42}
  :trail null
}

name: join-error-string-subject
expect:
!{
  :origin :qlang/eval
  :kind :type-error
  :thrown ::JoinSubjectNotVec
  :message "join requires Vec of Strings subject, got string"
  :operand "join"
  :position "subject"
  :expectedType "Vec of Strings"
  :actualType :string
  :actualValue "abc"
  :fault {:step ~{join(",")} :input "abc"}
  :trail null
}

name: join-error-set-subject
join-error-map-subject
join-error-element-not-string
join-error-element-null
join-error-element-vec
join-error-non-string-separator
join-error-keyword-separator
